20:09 â April 15, 2020
AFT Re-presentment FAQs
We updated the Payment Solutions Manual to clarify content on the AFT Re-presentment service, which is available to
PaymentStreamâ¢
AFT Originators. Please see details below.
AFT Volume
Introduction to AFT
Section 1.3, Summary of AFT Re-presentment
We added details about requesting the AFT Re-presentment service, and we provided a summary of the settlement reports that reflect AFT re-presented transactions and how you can identify them.
Section 2.2, Frequently Asked Questions
Question 11, Is it true that a dishonoured PAD can be re-presented?
â We clarified that the response applies to AFT Originators who are enrolled in the AFT Re-presentment service.
We added three sections to the FAQ table to address specific questions about the AFT Re-presentment service (Questions 12 to 26).
Section 5.4, Indicating AFT Re-presentment Preferences
We clarified that Central 1 will confirm the start date of AFT Re-presentment in the ServiceNow ticket along with other information related to the request.
